theory.canonical_statement: ID 412 establishes the exchange interaction between the localized electron spins of the reactor's ferrite core and the biological spin density of the operator's neural architecture. While ID 411 managed the massless photonic flux, ID 412 governs the momentum transfer required for physical "Tactile Feedback" from the vacuum manifold. The exchange integral Jij is modulated by the geometry of the L, ensuring that the electron spin wave (magnon) does not induce thermal damage to the synaptic gates. By anchoring the exchange distance to the neural coherence length neural, the operator can "feel" the torque of the Furiene Turbine as a proprioceptive extension of their own nervous system. Magnon Coupling: Maps the rotational momentum of the 12 node array into a rhythmic firing pattern within the motor cortex.
